purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Qingling Yajian multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic feather, bone, old wood, fur, hide rope, old iron, frozen earth, blackstone snow dust, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Do not create, draw, paint, carve, or imply a new Qingling emblem, crow crest, blue feather logo, large Wanshou badge, shield emblem, banner logo, faction logo, or sticker. The teal feather is only personal plumage. The locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance bonewood language may appear only as a tiny physical oath knot, small rope charm, tiny tool-carved sliver, or small feather wood tag no larger than a palm and partially obscured by rope.
must_have: Three full-body states must preserve one continuous named character identity.
Qingling Yajian must read as a Snowfeather crow scout: light-boned, long-limbed, wall-oriented, corvid-faced, tool-based, and low-magic.

Personal anchors must appear across the board: left-side low-saturation teal feather cluster, pale scar under the right eye or along right beak line, sharp corvid face, dark feather arm cape, bone hook, rope spool, message tube, three right-forearm bone rings, dark blood oath cord.
The board must read as a practical named character modeling sheet, not a poster and not a generic troop sheet.
No readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark.
shared_rules.negative_prompt: new Qingling emblem, new crow crest, blue feather logo, large Wanshou badge, large faction logo, wall emblem, shield emblem, painted shield symbol, banner mark, sticker overlay, redesigned Northern emblem, redesigned Wanshou badge, single crow logo, generic Snowfeather troop, all states with different character identities, Luming noble shaman costume, deer antlers, bone flute main identity, white noble fur robe, human Grey Wall soldier, Suming insect infantry, Qingming white wax bindings, black-green chitin insect body, Yingzhou shrine styling, samurai armor, ninja suit, modern assassin outfit, human ranger, elf archer, cute animal mascot, cartoon bird person, angel wings, large glowing wings, heroic flying pose, air force spectacle, high-magic blue-purple aura, spell circle, sci-fi gear, cyberpunk, modern military uniform, ragged beggar clothes, monster horde, gore, blood-soaked horror, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark

input_images.role: locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem reference; do not redesign, redraw, enlarge, or place as a visible shield/wall/battlefield emblem
locked symbol system reference for material language only: bonewood oath knots, rawhide ties, horn-branch material, claw-tooth cuts, feather wood pieces, and blue survival fire points
Northern bone, old wood, fur, hide rope, oath cord, and frost material reference
generic Snowfeather wall-climber contrast; Qingling Yajian must keep individual personal anchors
Northern noble shaman contrast; Qingling Yajian must not inherit aristocratic or shamanic costume language

prompts.image_prompt:
Create one single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for Qingling Yajian / 青翎鸦见 from the series Severed Homeland. Use the visual references already provided in this conversation: low-magic eastern epic style, border-to-north palette, Northern bonewood-fur materials, blackstone snowline, frozen earth, ochre grass, weathered feather, rawhide rope, dark blood oath cord, old wood, old iron, bone white, and tiny restrained blue survival fire. Do not redesign any badge. Do not create, draw, paint, carve, or imply any new Qingling emblem, crow crest, blue feather logo, large Wanshou badge, wall emblem, shield emblem, banner logo, faction logo, sticker, or decorative crest. The teal feather is only personal plumage, not a symbol. If faction continuity appears at all, it must be a tiny physical bonewood oath knot, small rope charm, tiny tool-carved sliver, or small feather wood tag no larger than a palm and partly hidden by rope; never a readable emblem or new crest.

Qingling Yajian is an individual Snowfeather crow scout, not a generic troop. She is light-boned, long-limbed, narrow-torsoed, wall-oriented, practical, low-magic, and tool-based. The face should be a serious corvid beastfolk face: black-grey feather crown, short cheek feathers, sharp watchful black eyes, subtle beak-line or beak-shaped nose bridge, and a pale old scar under the right eye or along the right beak line. The face must not be cute, cartoonish, or a masked human. Her fixed personal identifiers are a low-saturation teal-green feather cluster on the left side of the head crown or left arm cape, the right-eye pale scar, three small bone rings on the right forearm, a dark blood oath cord on the left wrist or ankle, a bone message tube on the back or belt, dark smoke-grey feather-pattern arm cape, bone grappling hook, thin rawhide rope spool, light bone bracers, clawed hand and foot wraps, short knife, flag-cutting knife, and a small covered fire pot.

Show the same named character in three full-body states: 1) Northern Snowfeather scout default state: folded feather arm cape like a short worn cloak, bone grappling hook hanging at the shoulder, thin rope spool, narrow waist tool pouch, short knife, back or belt message tube, left teal feather cluster, right-eye scar, three right-forearm bone rings, and dark blood oath cord clearly visible; clothing is complete, old, light, and functional. 2) Wall-climb sabotage state: diagonal pose on plain blackstone wall, one arm extended by the bone hook, rawhide rope controlling the composition, feather arm cape half-open for balance, clawed foot braced on stone, light bracers visible, short flag-cutting blade ready; she is climbing or rope-throwing, not flying heroically. 3) Hanwubao snow-message state: colder concealed state with smoke-grey short scarf, snow-dusted feather mantle, covered small fire pot, stiff frozen rope, message tube carried close, blackstone snow dust, same teal feather cluster and right-eye scar still visible; this state is covert and practical, not noble shaman clothing.

Include silent detail panels with no text: close-up of corvid face with black eyes, left teal feather cluster, and right-eye scar; folded and half-open feather arm cape; bone grappling hook with old iron tip and rawhide rope spool; light bone forearm bracer, clawed hand and foot wraps, blackstone scrape marks; short knife, flag-cutting knife, covered fire pot; small bone message tube sealed with leather, no readable writing; tiny bonewood oath knot or feather wood sliver partly hidden by rope, explicitly not an emblem; material swatch strip for smoke feather black, frozen earth grey, bone white, wind-eroded brown, dark hide, old iron, dark blood red, low-saturation teal feather, tiny blue survival fire, and blackstone snow dust. The board must look like a practical named character modeling sheet, not a poster, not a generic troop sheet, not a monster horde. Keep the image restrained, tactile, realistic, cold, worn, low-magic, and production-readable for mobile vertical reference. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no Chinese characters, no Latin letters, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: new Qingling emblem, new crow crest, blue feather logo, large Wanshou badge, large faction logo, wall emblem, shield emblem, painted shield symbol, banner mark, sticker overlay, redesigned Northern emblem, redesigned Wanshou badge, single crow logo, generic Snowfeather troop, all states with different character identities, Luming noble shaman costume, deer antlers, bone flute main identity, white noble fur robe, human Grey Wall soldier, Suming insect infantry, Qingming white wax bindings, black-green chitin insect body, Yingzhou shrine styling, samurai armor, ninja suit, modern assassin outfit, human ranger, elf archer, cute animal mascot, cartoon bird person, angel wings, large glowing wings, heroic flying pose, air force spectacle, high-magic blue-purple aura, spell circle, sci-fi gear, cyberpunk, modern military uniform, ragged beggar clothes, monster horde, gore, blood-soaked horror, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark
